text: Standing here, I feel as though I am at the intersection of observation and contemplation. The clean lines of glass, the anticipation of a meeting room, and the vibrant, thoughtful exhibition space invite me to reflect on the act of seeing and being seen. I sense the gentle hum of intellect around me, and a subtle tension between the comfort of knowledge and the unease of constant surveillance. It makes me both self-aware and curious, intrigued by the quiet drama of presence and absence in these constructed spaces.
